content:
IVX LANDING PAGE REGISTRATION REDESIGN

Objective:
Redesign the IVX registration and login experience to enterprise quality using IVX branding (black + gold). Do not copy Amazon branding, but implement the same level of usability and polish.

Requirements:

• Replace the current popup with a centered premium glass card.
• Add IVX logo and "Invest. Build. Grow." branding.
• Add animated Sign Up / Login tabs.
• Registration fields:
  - First Name
  - Last Name
  - Email
  - Phone
  - Password
  - Confirm Password
  - Role selector (Investor, Buyer, Realtor, Broker, Influencer, JV Partner, Tokenized Investor)
  - Optional profile picture
• Add email verification and phone OTP after signup.
• Add inline validation and clear error messages.
• Add password strength indicator.
• Add Remember Me and Forgot Password to login.
• Add secure badges (256-bit encryption, Privacy Protected).
• Make the design fully responsive for Android, iPhone, tablets, and desktop.
• Maintain accessibility (large touch targets, keyboard-safe layout).
• Preserve all existing authentication, Supabase, RBAC, and owner access logic.
• Verify registration creates the correct member record and routes the user to the proper dashboard after verification.
• Deploy to production and provide:
  - GitHub commit SHA
  - Render deployment ID
  - Production verification
  - Screenshots of Login and Registration on Android, iOS, and Web
